## Title

<!-- Short name of the suggestion -->

## Source

- AI system:
- Human user / reviewer:
- Date:
- Context:

## Observation

<!-- What did the AI or reviewer notice? -->

## Why It Matters

<!-- Why does this affect clarity, governance, onboarding, pilot use, AI readability or project value? -->

## Suggested Improvement

<!-- What should be changed, added or reviewed? -->

## Affected Files

<!-- List files if known. Use paths such as README.md or docs/... -->

## Expected Benefit

<!-- What improves if this is implemented? -->

## Risk If Implemented

<!-- What could go wrong if we apply this suggestion? -->

## Risk If Ignored

<!-- What could remain weak if we do nothing? -->

## Suggested Next Action

Choose one:

- [ ] Ignore
- [ ] Save for later
- [ ] Open focused issue
- [ ] Create small PR
- [ ] Ask for second AI review
- [ ] Needs human discussion

## Confidence

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High

## Human Review Gate

Maintainer decision:

- [ ] Accepted
- [ ] Rejected
- [ ] Deferred
- [ ] Converted to issue
- [ ] Converted to PR

Decision note:

<!-- Human owner / maintainer decision and reason -->
